author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone 

 Partnership Announcement: Star Atlas & Meta Gravity Join Forces! 

Get ready for a gaming revolution! Star Atlas and MetaGravity are teaming up to redefine industry standards. Utilizing groundbreaking MetaGravity tech, Star Atlas will unveil the world's first super-massive gaming experience, with record-breaking concurrent players, NPCs, and interactive objects within a single shared persistent environment seamlessly.

Leveling up... NOW

Learn more: https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-metagravity-bring-30000-concurrent-players-metaverse-game-a8af390a967b
